title: Fáilte
description: Adventure and RPG Themed Modpack in a world of your own imagination.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5cfb81f2b9be97c82a2ca3d3456d5dffceb9fac_0.webp)

This Modpack puts the Player into a populated Fantasy-World inspired by Universes such as Mabinogi or Baldurs Gate 3. Delve into dangerous Dungeons or rest various Taverns around the World.

It focuses around offering the Player an authentic RPG Experience, while still preserving the Core of what Minecraft is.

Features many classic Magic, Combat and Exploration Mods while offering a refreshing take on Adventure.

## Main Features

### Classes and Combat by RPG Series
- Choose from a Selection of Classes to enhance your Gameplay.

### Origins & Medieval Origins
- Choose from a selection of classical Fantasy Races

### Epic World Generation
- with realistic Heat-Maps and Poles

### Exploration
- Lots of new Structures keep the World fresh

### Focused around the Overworld
- No unnecessary Nether/End-Overhauls to preserve Optimization, Overworld is the place to be

### Longer Day/Night-Cycle and Seasons
- Make every Day matter

### Extensive Food and Decoration Choices
- Keep the Creativity flowing

### Character Enhancements
- RPG Series Classes rounded together with Skill-Trees make for expressive Character Progression

### Improved Mounts and Transportation
- Elytras are no longer required

### Group PvE Content
- New and improved Dungeons and Structures, as well as the Ability to revive your Friends make this Modpack perfectly suited for a Night of Slaying and Looting
- Voice Chat and Localized Chats make for an authentic Fantasy Party Experience

### Currency System
- Earn and spend Coins, inspired by Terraria

### Minimalistic Design
- Mods are choosen carefully to add as little Redundancy as possible, no duplicate Ores here

### Improved Visual and Audio Effects.
- Lots of Mods to improve the Audio and Visual Effects, Photon Shaders fully supported

Comes preinstalled with some Resourcepacks to add more Life into your World.
